name: feat-ESE-21-3
title: Tile polygon to density grid initialisation
description: Initialise a density grid from a tile's polygon. For each sample point in the grid, test if it's inside the tile polygon. Points inside get density 255, outside get 0. This bridges arbitrary tile shapes with the marching squares carving system.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Point-in-polygon test for arbitrary convex and concave polygons
- initDensityFromPolygon fills grid samples based on tile polygon
- Full square tile produces all-255 grid
- Triangle tile produces correct partial fill
- Half tile produces correct half fill
- Unit tested
testingScenarios:
- Full square polygon: all samples inside
- Bottom-left triangle: ~half samples inside
- Half-bottom tile: bottom half inside
- Custom polygon: verified manually
stakeholderUnderstanding: Bridging tile polygons to the density grid for carving.
